title: KLARA Routing Optimization Output
description: Output of the Gurobi/PuLP routing optimization model, for API responses and map visualization.

primary_pathway.description: Pathway ID selected as the primary recommendation

reason.description: Human-readable explanation of the routing decision

options.description: Ordered list of pathway IDs: primary first, then alternatives

care_sequence.description: Optional ordered care stages (e.g. VirtualCareNS → Lab → Specialist). When present, first element must equal primary_pathway.

optimizer.description: Solver metadata and cost/ranking data for visualization

solver.description: Solver used: gurobi, pulp, rule fallback, or bypass (e.g. emergency → 811)

status.description: Solver status (e.g. optimal, gurobi_2, rule_fallback, emergency_hitl_811)

objective_value.description: Cost value of the chosen pathway (minimized)

pathway_costs.description: Pathway ID → cost (for charts and ranking)

pathway_ranking.description: Pathway IDs in order of preference (best first), for display and map layers

region.description: Patient region for map context (e.g. Halifax, Cape Breton)

pathway_urls.description: Pathway ID → service info for map links and labels

locations.description: Optional: service locations for map visualization (from /api/nearby or pathway_urls)

session_id.description: Session ID for linking to intake and map state
